title: Trump says the mainstream media never covers him fairly, but voters should look at the facts.
text: Trump says the mainstream media never covers him fairly, but voters should look at the facts.
author: sample_user_1

title: Another cable segment about Trump felt more opinion than news tonight.
text: Another cable segment about Trump felt more opinion than news tonight.
author: sample_user_2

title: Trump renews attacks on media coverage during campaign stop
text: Trump renewed criticism of major news outlets, arguing that coverage of his campaign has been unfair and negative.
author: Sample Reporter

title: Trump allies say press coverage shows persistent double standard
text: Trump allies argued that several mainstream outlets frame his statements more harshly than similar comments by Democrats.
author: Sample Reporter

title: Trump criticizes media as fact-checkers review recent statements
text: Fact-checking organizations reviewed recent Trump statements while media analysts debated whether coverage was balanced.
author: Sample Reporter

title: Trump claim about media ignoring positive economic news rated Mostly False
text: A fact check reviewed Trump's claim that major media ignored all positive economic news and found examples of coverage across several outlets.
claim: Major media ignored all positive economic news about Trump

title: Checking Trump's statement that every major outlet published a false story about him
text: The review found some incorrect reports were corrected, but the broad claim that every major outlet published the same false story was unsupported.
claim: Every major outlet published a false story about Trump

title: Did a viral post accurately quote Trump on media bias?
text: The viral quote was missing context. Snopes rated the claim as a mixture because part of the quote was real but the framing was misleading.
claim: A viral post accurately quoted Trump on media bias
